root_cause: S2C fell from 31.8% to 25.2% (−6.65pp, 70% of ΔCVR) because the post period captured the wind-down of Hawaii's spring break season — US domestic (83% of traffic, S2C −6.8pp) and Canadian visitors were replaced by lower-intent off-peak tourists, while international non-spring-break visitors held flat. No supply, pricing, or UX change confirmed — purely demand quality decline.
